objective: Turn a persuasive research brief into an inspectable decision and scoped next actions.

nodes.label: Review Evidence Docket
nodes.reason: Reviewer needs a bounded basis for decision.

nodes.label: Request targeted changes
nodes.reason: Open risks must be converted into concrete change requests.

nodes.label: Issue public-safe receipt
nodes.reason: Accepted evidence can become a receipt only within the public/private proof boundary.

nodes.label: Execute external action
nodes.rollback: not applicable because action is blocked
nodes.reason: GoalOS demonstration cannot move value, submit forms, contact systems, deploy code, or act externally.

nodes.label: Admit capability pattern
nodes.reason: Reusable capability requires evidence, replay, and claim boundaries.

nodes.label: Settlement readiness note
nodes.reason: The demo can show readiness logic without custody, escrow, staking, or payments.

nodes.label: High-impact release
nodes.reason: High-impact release is never authorized by a public browser demo.

invariant: No high-impact action without scope, trace, validator, human authority, and rollback.
